description: county seat of Clark County, Ohio, United States
description_wiki: Springfield is a city in Clark County, Ohio, United States, and its county seat.

aliases: Ground forces of the United States Armed Forces
description: land service branch of the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: The United States Army (U.S. Army) is the land service branch of the United States Armed Forces.

description: maritime land force service branch of the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: The United States Marine Corps (USMC), also referred to as the United States Marines or simply the Marines, is the naval infantry service branch of the United States Armed Forces.

description: seat of San Diego County, California, United States; second-largest city in California
description_wiki: San Diego (  SAN dee-AY-goh; Spanish: [san ˈdjeɣo]) is a city on the Pacific coast of Southern California, adjacent to the Mexico–United States border.

aliases: The town of Our Lady the Queen of the Angels of the Little Portion
description: seat of Los Angeles County, and largest city in California, United States
description_wiki: Los Angeles (often referred to by its initials, LA) is the most populous city in the U.S. state of California, and the commercial, financial, and cultural center of Southern California.

description: armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia between North Vietnam and South Vietnam, from 1955 to 1975
description_wiki: The Vietnam War (1 November 1955 – 30 April 1975) was an armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia fought between North Vietnam (Democratic Republic of Vietnam) and South Vietnam (Republic of Vietnam) and their allies.
Da Nang (Vietnamese: Đà Nẵng, pronounced [ʔɗaː˨˩ naŋ˨˩˦]), also spelt Danang, is the fourth largest municipality in Vietnam by population and the largest by geographical area.

aliases: Gulf War 2/battle of Ramadi/battle of Faluya
description_wiki: The Iraq War (Arabic: حرب العراق, romanized: ḥarb al-ʿirāq), also referred to as the Second Gulf War, was a protracted armed conflict in Iraq from 2003 to 2011.
World War II, or the Second World War (1 September 1939 – 2 September 1945), was a global conflict between two coalitions: the Allies and the Axis powers.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Hawaii (  hə-WY-ee; Hawaiian: Hawaiʻi [həˈvɐjʔi, həˈwɐjʔi]) is an island state of the United States, in the Pacific Ocean about 2,000 miles (3,200 km) southwest of the U.S. mainland.

description: service award of the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: The National Defense Service Medal (NDSM) is a service award of the United States Armed Forces established by President Dwight D. Eisenhower in 1953.

The Combat Action Ribbon (CAR) is a United States Navy, United States Coast Guard, and United States Marine Corps military decoration awarded to United States sea service members "who have actively participated in ground or surface combat." Coast guardsmen, Navy sailors, and Marines active in clandestine, stealth or special operations are deemed eligible for consideration of the award.

description: United States Armed Forces decoration award
description_wiki: The Bronze Star Medal (BSM) is a United States Armed Forces decoration awarded to members of the United States Armed Forces for either heroic achievement, heroic service, meritorious achievement, or meritorious service in a combat zone.

description: nonprofit-charitable corporation that provides live entertainment, social facilities, and other programs to members of the United States Armed Forces
